office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy, oversee departments and infrastructure, and represent county residents.
race_blurb: The approved dossiers verify both candidates but provide no sufficiently detailed professional biographies, policy mechanisms, or governing records.

candidates.summary: Official and local records verify Griffin’s candidacy but do not establish a detailed platform or county governing record.
Official and local records verify Burrows’s candidacy but do not establish a detailed platform or county governing record.
